content.full_text:
John R. Poyner  
2130 Ranch Road  
Colusa, CA 95932

February 14, 1992

Secretary of State  
Political Reform Division  
P.O. Box 1467  
Sacramento, CA 94812-1467

Re: Termination of Campaign

To Whom It May Concern;

I originally intended to run for the office of Colusa County Justice Court Judge; however, I changed my mind and did not file the Notice of Intent.

Prior to changing my mind, I withdrew $5,000 from my savings account and deposited it in a campaign account. I filed the appropriate forms numbered 410, 501 and 502. Now I am terminating the account. I have not expended any funds from the account.

It is my understanding that I need to file forms numbered 415, 490, 501, and 502 which are enclosed.

I am somewhat confused with form 490, Schedule B, Part I, Line 7. It indicates that I am supposed to transfer that figure on to the Summary Page, Column A, Line 2. In my case that would indicate $0.00, which would appear to be a deception.

Please let me know what else, if anything, I need to do.

Very truly yours,

John R. Poyner  
District Attorney

JRP:skr  
Enclosures
